features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Next.js 15 + TypeScript project setup, Tailwind CSS, mobile-first layout, PWA manifest, camera-ready viewport

features.name: Ingredient knowledge base
features.description: JSON database of 500+ pet food ingredients with: name, category, safety_rating (safe/caution/harmful), explanation, common_aliases. Sources: AAFCO, veterinary nutrition literature

features.name: Camera and image upload
features.description: Mobile camera capture via Web Camera API + image file upload. Preview image, crop to ingredient label area, handle permissions

features.name: OCR ingredient extraction
features.description: Tesseract.js client-side OCR to extract text from ingredient label photo. Parse comma-separated ingredient list into structured array. Handle Chinese + English labels

features.name: Ingredient analysis engine
features.description: Match extracted ingredients against knowledge base. Calculate overall grade (A-F) based on: harmful ingredient count, quality ingredient ratio, filler percentage. Flag each ingredient red/yellow/green

features.name: Analysis result display
features.description: Beautiful mobile UI showing: big letter grade badge with color, scrollable ingredient list with red/yellow/green flags, plain-language summary explaining why this food scored this grade

features.name: AI explanation generation
features.description: Claude API generates a 2-3 sentence plain-language explanation of why the food is good/bad, tailored for non-expert pet owners. Cached per ingredient combo to reduce API costs

features.name: Pet profile and personalization
features.description: Input: pet type (cat/dog), breed, age, weight, health conditions. Adjust scoring based on breed-specific sensitivities (e.g., grain sensitivity in certain breeds)

features.name: Scan history and comparison
features.description: LocalStorage-based scan history. Compare two foods side by side. Share results as image card (social media ready)

features.name: Social sharing cards
features.description: Generate shareable image card with grade + food name + key findings. One-tap share to WeChat/WhatsApp/Twitter. OG meta tags for link previews

features.name: Landing page and README
features.description: Marketing-grade landing page: hero with phone mockup, scan demo GIF, feature highlights, trust signals. GitHub README with badges, screenshots, setup guide

features.name: Open source packaging
features.description: MIT license, CONTRIBUTING.md, GitHub Actions CI, Vercel deployment, Docker option, open-source the ingredient knowledge base separately

features.name: MiSans font + screenshot-level visual polish
features.description: Replace default font with MiSans (Xiaomi open-source font). Polish result page, grade badge, ingredient list for screenshot-worthy mobile UI. Dark mode refinement, spacing, typography hierarchy. Every screen must look good as a social media screenshot.

features.name: Brand database — 50-100 popular brands pre-analyzed
features.description: Create data/brands.json with 50-100 popular cat/dog food brands (Chinese + international). Each entry: brand name, product line, ingredient list (from public packaging data), pre-computed analysis result via existing engine. Cover top brands: Royal Canin, Orijen, Acana, Blue Buffalo, 皇家, 渴望, 巅峰, 伯纳天纯, 网易严选, etc.

features.name: Brand search + brand result page
features.description: Brand search with instant filtering (Chinese + English input). Each brand has its own page at /brand/[slug] with shareable URL. Brand result page reuses AnalysisView but adds brand name, product line, and 'Scan your own food' CTA. Static generation via generateStaticParams for SEO.

features.name: Brand safety leaderboard page
features.description: Sortable ranking page at /ranking showing all brands by safety grade. Filter by pet type (cat/dog), sort by grade/name. Visual: grade badge + brand name + score in a clean table/card layout. This is the viral linkbait — '2026猫粮安全排行榜'.

features.name: Demo-first homepage redesign
features.description: Replace current landing page hero with: top brand ranking preview (top 5 best + worst), prominent search bar ('搜索你家的粮'), secondary CTA '或拍照扫描'. First screen must deliver value in 3 seconds — user sees real data immediately, no click needed. Keep feature highlights and trust signals below the fold.

features.name: Code quality audit (phase 2)
features.description: Review F013-F017 code: God Component splits, duplicate code, defensive coding, consistent naming, test coverage for new features. Fix issues found.

features.name: i18n + Chinese localization
features.description: Add i18n framework (next-intl or custom). Support zh-CN and en. Translate all UI strings to Chinese. Chinese ingredient names shown first when user locale is zh. Language switcher in header. Default to browser locale.

features.name: Zero-friction experience flow
features.description: Remove Pet Profile as mandatory step before scanning. New flow: Scan → Camera → Result. Pet Profile becomes optional from result page ('Get personalized analysis' link). First-time experience must be: tap scan → take photo → see grade. 3 steps max.

features.name: Knowledge base gap fill + fuzzy matching
features.description: Add missing ingredients (Artificial Colors, Artificial Flavors, generic terms). Improve matcher: fuzzy matching for OCR typos, handle compound names ('chicken by-product meal'), normalize spaces/hyphens/case. Reduce 'unknown' rate on real scans.

features.name: README rewrite — developer-focused golden structure
features.description: Rewrite README.md: hero GIF (scan→grade loop), one-line hook, ranking screenshot, feature table, tech stack, quick start, architecture overview, knowledge base stats, contributing guide. English primary. Must sell to developers: 'open-source pet food safety analyzer with 500+ ingredient database'.

features.name: Code quality audit (phase 3)
features.description: Review F019-F022 code quality. Focus on i18n consistency, fuzzy matching edge cases, routing, test coverage. Fix issues found.

features.name: Vercel deployment + per-brand OG meta
features.description: Deploy to Vercel with environment variables. Each /brand/[slug] page gets unique OG title/description/image for social sharing previews. Homepage OG shows ranking preview. Test OG cards on Twitter Card Validator and Facebook Sharing Debugger.

features.name: Share link optimization — auto-generated share images
features.description: Generate unique share images per brand/result: grade badge + brand name + harmful count + ToxicPaw branding. Use Next.js OG image generation (next/og) or canvas-based approach. Every shared link must have a compelling preview image across all platforms (小红书/抖音/X/WeChat).

features.name: Code quality audit (phase 4)
features.description: Final pre-launch audit. Performance check (Lighthouse), accessibility, SEO, bundle size, image optimization. Fix critical issues.

features.name: Open API + CLI tool
features.description: Public API at /api/v1/analyze and /api/v1/lookup with docs page. CLI: npx toxicpaw analyze 'ingredient list'. Developer-facing features for GitHub stars.
features.notes: Deferred — has hosting cost implications. Do after traction.

features.name: Multi-platform distribution prep
features.description: Prepare assets for launch across: 小红书, 抖音, B站, X/Twitter, Reddit (r/petcare, r/nextjs), Hacker News, Product Hunt, V2EX, 即刻. Platform-specific content formats and copy.
features.notes: Deferred — needs human to create accounts, record videos, write platform-specific copy.

features.name: Brand database expansion to 300+
features.description: Expand brand database from 100 to 300+ products. Add more Chinese domestic brands, specialty/prescription diets, raw food brands.
features.notes: Deferred — can be done incrementally after launch based on user demand.

features.name: Monetization architecture
features.description: Alternative recommendation engine (low-score → suggest high-score alternatives with affiliate links). Affiliate integration with JD/Taobao/Chewy. API pricing for B2B.
features.notes: Deferred — need traffic first. BaiFu path: virality → attention → monetization.

features.name: Framer Motion + animation infrastructure
features.description: Install framer-motion. Create reusable animation wrappers: FadeIn, SlideUp, ScaleIn, StaggerChildren, CountUp, PageTransition. All in src/components/motion/. Must not break existing functionality. See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md for details.

features.name: Grade reveal animation
features.description: Grade badge: 3D flip reveal + scale bounce on mount. Score counter animates 0 to final value. Grade label fades in after badge. Background glow pulse matching grade color. Apply to GradeBadge in /brand/[slug] and scan result. See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md.

features.name: Scan analysis ceremony
features.description: Replace spinner with multi-stage animation: (1) scan beam sweeps image, (2) ingredients fly out as text particles, (3) sort into safe/caution/harmful, (4) grade reveals with F032 animation. ~3.5s total. See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md.

features.name: Hero section visual overhaul
features.description: Homepage hero: animated gradient text title, search bar glow/pulse border, brand cards hover lift+glow, stats CountUp on scroll. Dark theme with accent glows. See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md.

features.name: Share card visual upgrade
features.description: Redesign server-side share images: gradient background, glassmorphism card, grade-colored glow, better typography. Must make people ask 'what app is this?' See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md.

features.name: Global micro-interactions + page transitions
features.description: Page transitions with AnimatePresence, button press scale, ingredient list stagger, scroll-triggered fade-in, search dropdown animate. Subtle premium feel. See docs/specs/visual-overhaul-spec.md.
